---
title: "Summer School 2025"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Intensive Technology Program"
description: "Enroll in Summer School 2025, an intensive program in Craiova covering cybersecurity, cloud computing, and artificial intelligence tracks."
page-layout: custom
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
date: "2025-06-02"
enddate: "2025-08-20"
location: "Private, Craiova"
category: "summer-school"
registration_date: "2025-07-07"
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Summer School 2025</h1>
    <p>An intensive month-long program focusing on cybersecurity, cloud computing, and artificial intelligence</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="event-header">
  <div class="event-dates">
    <span class="badge bg-primary">July 20 - August 20, 2026</span>
    <div class="event-actions">
      <a href="/events/ical/summer-school-2025.ics" class="m-bo btn-sm" download>
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Add to Calendar
      </a>
      <a href="/events/pdfs/summer-school-2025.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" download>
        <i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> Download PDF
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="event-location">
    <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Private, Craiova
  </div>
</div>
```

## Event Overview

The Summer School 2025 is an intensive two-week program focused on cutting-edge technologies and practical skills development. Perfect for students and professionals looking to enhance their technical capabilities in a condensed, immersive format.

## Program Details

Over the course of two weeks, participants will:

- Engage with industry experts through daily workshops and lectures
- Work on real-world projects in small teams
- Build a comprehensive portfolio of technical work
- Network with peers and potential employers
- Receive personalized mentorship and feedback

## Curriculum

### Week 1: Fundamentals & Exploration

| Day | Morning | Afternoon |
|-----|---------|----------|
| Monday | Opening Ceremony & Introduction | Technology Landscape Overview |
| Tuesday | Web Development Foundations | Responsive Design Workshop |
| Wednesday | Backend Architecture | Database Design Principles |
| Thursday | API Development | Integration Challenges |
| Friday | Cloud Infrastructure | Deployment Strategies |

### Week 2: Advanced Topics & Project Work

| Day | Morning | Afternoon |
|-----|---------|----------|
| Monday | AI & Machine Learning Intro | Data Analysis Workshop |
| Tuesday | Applied ML Techniques | Computer Vision Labs |
| Wednesday | Security Fundamentals | Ethical Hacking Workshop |
| Thursday | Project Work | Project Work |
| Friday | Final Presentations | Closing Ceremony & Networking |

```{=html}
<div class="bg-primary p-3 rounded">
  <h3 class="text-white">Cybersecurity Track</h3>
  <p>Specialized training for participants interested in security careers</p>
</div>
```

## Included Courses & Training

```{=html}
<div class="bg-primary p-3 rounded mb-4">
  <h3 class="text-white">Recommended Courses</h3>
  <p>All of the following <strong>introductory-level</strong> courses are included as part of the summer school curriculum:</p>
</div>
```

### Core Introductory Courses
- **Cybersecurity Fundamentals**: Essential security concepts and best practices for beginners
- **Network Security Basics**: Introduction to securing networks against modern threats
- **Secure Coding Principles**: Fundamentals of writing secure applications and preventing vulnerabilities

### Specialized Introductory Trainings
- **Ethical Hacking Fundamentals**: Introductory hands-on penetration testing techniques
- **Incident Response Basics**: Introduction to effective handling of security incidents
- **Security Architecture Principles**: Fundamentals of building secure systems from the ground up

### Microlearning Modules
- **Daily Security Briefings**: Current threat landscape updates (20-minute sessions)
- **Security Tool Spotlights**: 30-minute focused sessions on essential security tools
- **Capture The Flag Challenges**: Quick practical exercises throughout the program
- **Command Line Essentials**: Fast-paced introduction to terminal basics (45-minute sessions)
- **Git Fundamentals**: Version control system introduction (30-minute sessions)
- **Containerization Basics**: Docker introduction for beginners (45-minute sessions)
- **Cloud Security Fundamentals**: Introduction to securing cloud resources (30-minute sessions)
- **API Security Basics**: Introduction to API vulnerabilities and protections (25-minute sessions)
- **Mobile Security Principles**: Overview of mobile app security fundamentals (40-minute sessions)

## Who Should Attend

- Students pursuing degrees in computer science or related fields
- Early-career professionals looking to expand their skill set
- Career changers transitioning into tech roles
- Educators seeking to update their technical knowledge

## Registration Information

Registration opens on July 7, 2025. Early registration is recommended as spaces are limited to 50 participants to ensure a high-quality, personalized experience.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Is accommodation provided?
Accommodation is not included in the program fee. However, we can assist with recommendations and have partnered with nearby hotels to offer discounted rates.

### What level of technical knowledge is required?
Participants should have basic programming experience (in any language) and familiarity with web concepts. A pre-course assessment and learning resources will be provided to help you prepare.

### Will I receive a certificate?
Yes, all participants who complete the program will receive a certificate of completion. Additionally, top performers will receive special recognition.

### Can I attend virtually?
The program is designed as an in-person experience to maximize hands-on learning and networking. However, select lectures may be available for remote viewing.

## What's Next

After completing the Summer School, participants are encouraged to apply their new skills at these upcoming events and programs:

- **[Computer Club](/academy/programs/computerclub/)** - Ongoing monthly meetups and workshops
- **[SpaceApps Challenge 2025](/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/challenge-2025.html)** - October 3-5, 2026
- **[Cybersecurity Hackathon](/academy/programs/hackathons/cybersecurity-hackathon.html)** - November 15-17, 2026
- **[AI Ethics Hackathon](/academy/programs/hackathons/ai-ethics-hackathon.html)** - May 10-12, 2026

## Press Releases

```{=html}
<div class="row mt-4 mb-5">
  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-primary text-white">
        <h3 class="mb-0 text-white">Press Release (English)</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>Download our official press release for Summer School 2025 in English.</p>
        <a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/press/summer-school-2025-press-en.pdf" class="m-bo" download>
          <i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> Download English Press Release
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="col-md-6">
    <div class="card mb-4">
      <div class="card-header bg-success text-white">
        <h3 class="mb-0">Comunicat de Presa (Romana)</h3>
      </div>
      <div class="card-body">
        <p>Descarcati comunicatul nostru de presa oficial pentru Scoala de Vara 2025 in limba romana.</p>
        <a href="/academy/programs/summer-school/press/summer-school-2025-press-ro.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-success" download>
          <i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> Descarca Comunicatul de Presa
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Summer School 2025</h2>
    <p>Interested in this program? Get in touch to learn more.</p>
    <a href="/contact.html" class="m-lk">Contact Us</a>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
